summary.concern: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — 22 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 97 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 37 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 23 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 5 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522) — cleared all overdue.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 22 total — this schedule needs a reset. 160 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **66 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 63 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 40 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Ginger Brown and Clifford Clack — Gym Addition — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 28. This needs to turn around today.
